sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Jesuh si le siantho na hi;
A dang thu teng ka um ngam
Jesuh a min bek ka um thei.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Omna dang teng sehnel bang hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Khuamial in a mai liah ciangin,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tuipi kanlai ka muang ding hi;

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Pengkul aw tawh hong pai ciangin,
mai ah ka ding nuam hi;
A hong siangtho sak khit ciangin,
Mawhnei loin ka om ding hi.
